# 434 MEDIA

> 434 MEDIA is a creative media and smart marketing agency in San Antonio, TX, delivering ROI-driven brand strategy, video production, web development, programmatic and OTT/CTV advertising, multichannel campaigns, and event production for enterprise clients across South Texas and the United States.

We partner with venture capital firms, accelerators, startups, healthcare and life-science organizations, civic and nonprofit institutions, and enterprise brands. Our model combines in-house production capability — video, web, design, and event execution — with measurable, performance-driven media strategy.

- Headquarters: 816 Camaron St., Suite 1.11, San Antonio, TX 78212
- Contact: build@434media.com
- Founded and operated as 434 Media

## Services

- [Brand Storytelling](https://www.434media.com/work): Narrative-first strategy and storytelling for category-defining enterprises and startups.
- [Video Production](https://www.434media.com/work): Concept-to-delivery production for brand films, ad campaigns, event coverage, and ongoing content programs.
- [Web Development](https://www.434media.com/work): Modern marketing sites and platforms on Next.js, with conversion goals, analytics, and accessibility built in.
- [Event Production](https://www.434media.com/events): Programming, on-site capture, and post-event amplification for summits, demo days, and industry conferences.
- [Programmatic & OTT/CTV Advertising](https://www.434media.com/work): Audience-targeted programmatic, OTT, and connected-TV media buying with creative production and performance reporting.
- [Multichannel Marketing Strategy](https://www.434media.com/work): Integrated campaigns across paid media, social, email, and content — sequenced to brand, demand, and pipeline objectives.
- [Content Strategy & Production](https://www.434media.com/blog): Editorial planning, on-brand content, and distribution playbooks for B2B audience and category authority.
- [Social Media Management](https://www.434media.com/work): Channel-native strategy, content production, and community engagement.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.434media.com/): Agency overview and positioning.
- [Our Work](https://www.434media.com/work): Selected portfolio of brand, video, event, and integrated campaign work.
- [Blog](https://www.434media.com/blog): Insights on creative media, marketing strategy, and South Texas innovation.
- [Events](https://www.434media.com/events): Upcoming and recent community and industry events.
- [Shop](https://www.434media.com/shop): TXMX Boxing premium apparel rooted in Texas-Mexico boxing culture.
- [Contact](https://www.434media.com/contact): Start a project conversation.

## Sub-brands and initiatives

- TXMX Boxing — boxing-inspired apparel and content celebrating Texas-Mexico fight culture.
- Digital Canvas — community media platform amplifying South Texas creators and innovators.
- AIM Health R&D Summit — annual healthcare research and innovation gathering.
- SDOH — bilingual education on the social determinants of health.
- VemosVamos, AMPD Project, Salute to Troops, DEVSA TV — additional production initiatives.

## Service area

San Antonio, TX · South Texas · State of Texas · United States (remote-friendly engagements)
